items.title: Protests in Ukraine's cities against Zelensky's removal of defence minister
items.dek: Ukraine's president has not explained Mykhailo Fedorov's dismissal, which is causing great upset among civil society and the military.
items.body: Ukraine's president has not explained Mykhailo Fedorov's dismissal, which is causing great upset among civil society and the military.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Russian couple detained in Istanbul after reading Bible in Hagia Sophia
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Chip giant TSMC pledges another $100bn to expand US production
items.dek: The company says it will create "high-tech, high-paying jobs", and raises its total commitment to the US to $265bn.
items.body: The company says it will create "high-tech, high-paying jobs", and raises its total commitment to the US to $265bn.
items.author: IriLine Desk
